title: Data Model, Deployment, Observability, and Release Readiness
objective: Finalize database schema, deployment infrastructure, observability stack, and release process to meet PRD production targets.
scope: Implement and validate required s004 tables for analytics and trading.
Containerized deployment with Docker/Kubernetes and Redis/Postgres.
Performance and reliability test plan with go-live checklist.
deliverables: Migration scripts for all required PRD tables.
Docker compose for local staging and K8s manifests/helm baseline.
success_metrics: Option data latency under 2 seconds end-to-end.
Signal generation under 1 second after cycle trigger.
risks: Resource limits under market open spikes.
Insufficient observability for intermittent broker issues.
open_questions: Single-cluster deployment first or separate data/compute clusters?
Target RPO/RTO requirements for disaster recovery?
